home.servicesDescription: We offer a full spectrum of design services — from concept to completion, tailored to every space and purpose.
home.serviceInteriorDesc: Crafting functional, beautiful interiors for commercial and residential spaces.
home.serviceArchDesc: Designing structures that balance form, function, and context.
home.serviceFurnitureDesc: Custom-made furniture that complements every design vision.
home.serviceCraftDesc: Artisanal details and bespoke craftsmanship for unique projects.
home.processTitle:
A clear process,
from vision to reality
home.processDescription: Every project follows a structured approach — ensuring quality, transparency, and alignment at every stage.
home.step1Desc: Understanding your needs, budget, and vision through in-depth conversation.
home.step2Desc: Developing mood boards, layouts, and initial concepts for your approval.
home.step3Desc: Detailed drawings, material selection, and 3D visualization.
home.step4Desc: Construction supervision, quality control, and handover.
home.aboutTitle: We believe great design starts with listening — to the space, the people, and the purpose.
home.aboutDescription: Two Desk Studio is a multidisciplinary design practice based in Bangkok. We specialize in interior, architecture, furniture, and craft design — approaching each project with curiosity and precision.
home.ctaDescription: Tell us about your project. We'd love to hear your ideas and explore how we can bring them to life.

hero.label: About Us
hero.heading: We believe great design starts with listening
hero.description: Two Desk Studio is a multidisciplinary design practice based in Bangkok. We specialize in interior, architecture, furniture, and craft design — approaching each project with curiosity and precision.
hero.story1: Twodesk Studio began with two freshly graduated friends from architecture school, working together in a small room with only two desks. As time passed, more projects came in and the team gradually grew to four members who shared the same vision and passion for design.
hero.story2: In 2022, the team officially founded Twodesk Studio Co.,Ltd. — a design company built on collaboration, creativity, and the belief that great architecture begins with understanding.

philosophy.heading: Design with purpose, build with care
philosophy.paragraph1: Twodesk Studio began with two freshly graduated friends from architecture school, working together in a small room with only two desks. As time passed, more projects came in and the team gradually grew to four members who shared the same vision and passion for design.
philosophy.paragraph2: In 2022, the team officially founded Twodesk Studio Co.,Ltd. — a design company built on collaboration, creativity, and the belief that great architecture begins with understanding.
